ItacAcademyItem.Name: Pacifici (Accademia de`)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: After the Collegio dei Gesuiti divided into a school and an academy, it was agreed that the academy would be called the Pacifici on 16 September 1628.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
